negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_ba361e3c-bea8-48c0-b92a-33e00bc7fe55
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out onto a two-lane road in a suburban area under an overcast sky. The road markings include a straight path, a left-turn arrow, a right-turn arrow, a stop marking, and a bicycle symbol, all clearly visible on the road surface. On the left side of the road, there is a building with a red roof, while the right side features a house with a beige exterior and a well-maintained lawn. A yellow car is driving towards the camera, moving forward as the video progresses. The car passes by the ego vehicle and then exits the frame, without making any visible turn. The ego vehicle continues moving forward and comes to a stop on the left-turn-only lane. The lane markers, STOP signs, and bicycle symbols go out of the frame as the ego vehicle halts. The environment remains consistent throughout, with reflections of trees visible on the hood of the ego vehicle as it moves forward. The video concludes with the ego vehicle coming to a halt, yielding and preparing to turn left, while the yellow car is no longer visible and the surroundings remain unchanged.
